text: What are your views on the present government — the president, government policies, etc.?
What are your feelings about how parents ought to deal with children?
What do you think and feel about religion? What are your personal religious views?
What are your favorite beverages, and which ones don't you like?
What are your tastes in clothing?
What kind of party or social gathering do you like best, and what kind would bore you or that you wouldn't enjoy?
What do you enjoy most, and get the most satisfaction from, in your present work or studies?
How do you feel about the salary or rewards you get for your work?
What do you feel are your shortcomings or handicaps that prevent you from working as you'd like to, or that prevent you from getting further ahead?
What kinds of things make you especially proud of yourself, elated, or full of self-esteem?
What feelings, if any, do you have trouble expressing or controlling?
Are there things in the past or present that you feel ashamed or guilty about?
What are your present physical measurements — height, weight, waist, etc.?
How do you feel about the appearance of your face — things you don't like, and things you might like about your face and head?
Do you have any long-range worries or concerns about your health, such as cancer, ulcers, or heart trouble?
What are all of your present sources of income — wages, fees, allowance, dividends, etc.?
Do you owe money to anyone? If so, how much?
Who do you owe money to at present, or who have you borrowed from in the past?
